title: OQ, DHL Partner to Introduce Sustainable Aviation Fuel in Cargo Shipments
content: As part of its continued commitment to sustainability and carbon reduction, OQ has partnered with DHL Express by joining the GoGreen Plus programme. Through this collaboration, Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) will be used for DHLâ€™s cargo shipments entering and leaving Oman; a meaningful step towards low-carbon logistics.This initiative aligns with OQâ€™s long-term strategy to achieve carbon neutrality. Sustainable Aviation Fuel is produced from renewable resources, including used cooking oil and sugarcane, and can reduce carbon emissions by up to 30 percent compared to conventional jet fuel.
author: Analysts Account
